title: 宝塚記念の後に・上には上があるものよ

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Wraaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: (This one's mine!)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Didn't ya hear me the first time?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I told ya burns'll be the least of your worries!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross breaks through! She's taken the
lead! Tamamo Cross has the lead!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: (Wh-whoa! ...So this is White Lightning!)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Tamamo Cross crosses the finish!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Woohoo! And da Takarazuka Kinen goes to me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Heh, hehe... My legs are still tremblin'... You've
got one helluva run!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: You weren't half bad yourself, Inari.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Tama!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Till the very end, ya kept tryna take me out. I can
dig that. Thanks to you, I've toughened up a
little.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Let's do this again if we can.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I promise to take things up a notch.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Tama... ya stuck true to your words. I'm feelin'
more than a few burns right now, but...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
That's 'cause ya set somethin' in me on fire! Seein'
your drive to win—right up close—it lit my soul on
fire!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
There may be a hefty distance between us now...
but one day, I'm steppin' into your lane.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Next year's Takarazuka Kinen, I'll be the one
roarin' after my victory!
